Variables.Name: Up
Variables.Description: Happens when the user presses up arrow, joystick, d-pad.

Variables.Name: Down
Variables.Description: Happens when the user presses down arrow, joystick, d-pad.

Variables.Name: Left
Variables.Description: Happens when the user presses left arrow, joystick, d-pad.

Variables.Name: Right
Variables.Description: Happens when the user presses right arrow, joystick, d-pad.

Variables.Name: Next
Variables.Description: Happens when the user presses Tab.

Variables.Name: Previous
Variables.Description: Happens when the user presses Shift+Tab.
